title: tooling=beads factor did not take effect — bd unavailable, agent fell back to harness task tracker
evidence: _agent_stdout.log final result: "The instructions asked me to use bd (beads), but it isn't installed ... I used the harness's task tracker instead"; no .beads/ directory in run_dir
suggestion: For the tooling factor to be a real variable, verify bd is installed/available in the playpen before the run (per CLAUDE.md: a parameter set-but-not-verified is worse than none)

title: test_coverage=0.99 (not 1.0) — one uncovered line
evidence: scores.json: test_coverage=0.99; defect_rate=1.0 and no_regression=1.0 confirm build+all tests pass. Likely the pop_earliest() no-reservation return path in catalog/reservations.py:62 or a defensive branch
